listings.title: Oscar-Schmidt OE40 Jazz Guitar
listings.body: This is the large-size Oscar Schmidt OE40 Hollowbody made by Washburn. Has the Eliminator Jazz Series pickups and maple top, back, and sides. Pearl inlays on the rosewood fingerboard and gold hardware. A case is NOT included.

listings.title: Traynor YF10 speaker cabinet
listings.body: This offering is for a Traynor YF-10 speaker cabinet (SN 1081322), with four 10" speakers and casters.  The Traynor YF-10 speaker cabinet is rated at 200 watts at 8 ohms. It is designed to work well with guitar and bass amplifiers For the safety of all parties, pickup will be at Yonkers Police 1st Precinct, located at 730 E Grassy Sprain Rd, Yonkers, New York.

listings.title: CRYOGENIC MOBILE REFRIGERATOR
listings.body: Cryogenic Mobile Refrigerator – DW‑86W25 (2024) – $1,000 (Local Pickup) Model: DW‑86W25 Serial Number: 2401016 Manufactured: January 2024 Temperatur range: -40C ~86C Volume (L): 20 Power Supply: 220V/50/60Hz Install Power: 1/2HP Refrigerant: R404a Power consumption: (kwh/24h) : 3.8 Price: $1,000 Condition: Excellent / Fully Functional Selling a cryogenic mobile refrigerator in great working condition. Ideal for labs, research facilities, medical storage, biotech, or any environment needing reliable ultra‑low‑temperature performance. Highlights: Ultra‑low‑temperature capability Mobile design for easy transport Clean, well‑maintained, and ready for use 2024 manufacturing date — modern and efficient Perfect for anyone needing dependable cold‑chain storage at a fraction of the cost of new equipment. Pickup only. Message if you want to see it or need more details.
